---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "Turmites"
date: 2020-06-20
summary: '"From little things big things grow" (Paul Kelly, Kev Carmody)'
trailer: "gallery/turmite/preview/turmite_12.png"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
source("../../diziet.R")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery()
```
